intake.business_question: Which customers are at risk of lapsing and what drives that behavior?
intake.population: Customers with at least one purchase in trailing 12 months
hypotheses: Low purchase frequency and high recency are strongest predictors of lapse
Digital disengagement precedes lapse — email and app engagement are leading indicators
Single-category buyers lapse at higher rate than multi-category buyers
Bronze loyalty tier customers lapse at higher rate
Shorter tenure customers may lapse at higher rate

null_treatments.email_open_rate: Null means email opt-out — create binary flag, do not impute
null_treatments.app_sessions_30d: Null means no app download — treat as zero engagement
null_treatments.promo_response_rate: Null means not enrolled in promo program — create binary flag
